headline: Microsoft Solutions Partner Aureus Intelligence AI Launches HyperScoper™ - First AI-Powered Instant Estimator for Power Platform and Copilot Projects in the UK
summary: UK Businesses Can Now Get Expert-Validated Solution Proposals and Cost Estimates in Under 60 Minutes - Without a Single Discovery CallLONDON, March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Aureus Intelligence AI, a Microsoft Solutions Partner with FastTrack Recognized Solution Architect (FTRSA) status and a proven track record delivering £500,000+ in annual savings for organizations including NHS, Shell, and Johnson & Johnson, today launched HyperScoper™, the UK's first AI-powered instant estimator for Micr
